elements.title: Kim Petras's new album
elements.contents: ... that Kim Petras's new album features a track about a brutalist building (pictured) that she passed on the way to gender-care appointments as a child?

elements.title: Eight-Finger Phước
elements.contents: ... that Vietnamese gangster Eight-Finger Phước cut off two of his own fingers after his mother scolded him?

elements.title: Field Guide to Memory
elements.contents: ... that the creators of Field Guide to Memory coined the term keepsake game to describe the new genre that they hoped it would establish?

elements.title: a novel in which a goldfish is inserted into a vagina
elements.contents: ... that an infamous sex scene in the bonkbuster genre appears in a novel in which a goldfish is inserted into a vagina?

elements.title: the female founder of a dervish group in Afghanistan
elements.contents: ... that the female founder of a dervish group in Afghanistan was forced to flee the country in 2021?

elements.title: a Florida TV station
elements.contents: ... that a Florida TV station named after "Christ, the Alpha and the Omega" moved to shed its religious image within two years of its debut?

elements.title: Vieira's spiny tree-rat
elements.contents: ... that only two specimens of Vieira's spiny tree-rat are known to exist?

elements.title: Harry Hoch
elements.contents: ... that MLB player Harry Hoch was also a superintendent of schools at age 18?

elements.title: State of Decay 3
elements.contents: ... that the first trailer for State of Decay 3 was released before development had begun, when the game existed only as a Word document?
